title: Page Registry
heading: Page Registry
description: Minimize registry boilerplate and produce clean, LLM-friendly test frameworks.

fixtures.title: Automatic Fixtures
fixtures.description: Rather than declaring a Page Object class for simple pages, you can declare them inline inside `createPageRegistry` to automatically obtain fully-typed specs:

ai.title: AI-Friendly Design
ai.description: Most standard automation frameworks use highly inconsistent APIs (`page.locator()`, `getByRole()`, custom regex). This causes agents and LLMs to produce inconsistent code.
ai.subtext: `pw-core` standardizes API syntax into simple commands (`.click()`, `.fill()`, `.verify()`), delivering major benefits:
benefits: Smaller code context translates to significantly lower token usage.
Highly predictable generated specs with virtually zero synth selector hallucination.
Shorter, cleaner tests that take seconds to review and merge.
